violations.text: Soap and paper towels were not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap as well as a hand drying provision. Soap and paper towels were provided during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026

Raw animal foods (such as sea scallops) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as lettuce) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Food items were rearranged during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026

The double doors to the outside, located in the back hallway, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

The double doors to the outside, located in the back hallway, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Utensils were moved to a dry clean surface during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2025
